calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Annie Henry (Trustee). Daniel Murphy for Robert McClain.

Mr. Bassi stated that his Client does not object to the Court confirming the trust amendment. Mr. Murphy asked the Court to confirm the Successor Trustees as of the date of Ms. Henry's death. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order) and stated that it had no problem with Mr. Murphy's request.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Continued To Feb-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order Appointing Debra J. Dolch As General Successor Trustee Upon Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee, And Setting Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Ann McClain as Trustee of the Marital Trust. Arthur Park for Ann McClain (individually). Daniel Murphy for Robert McClain.

Mr. Bassi stated that the Substitution of Attorney had not been filed. Mr. Park stated that he was here to withdraw his petition to appoint Debra Dolch as Trustee. Mr. Bassi and Mr. Murphy presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was continued to February 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The opposition and the response to the opposition are to be done in writing. The Petition For an Order Appointing Debra Dolch as General Successor Trustee Upon Vacancy is withdrawn.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For An Order Appointing Debra J. Dolch As General Successor Trustee Upon Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee, And Setting Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Ann McClain. Daniel Murphy for Robert McClain.

Mr. Park stated that his firm was withdrawing, that his Client was not willing to consent to the withdrawal and requested a 30 day continuance to allow his Client to obtain new Counsel. Mr. Murphy opposed Mr. Park's request. The matter was continued to December 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Continued To Nov-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Murphy for Robert McClain. Deborah Fox for Ann McClain.

The Court stated that before it was a petition for an order accepting the resignation of Trustee Annie Louise Henry (etc.), that there were two responses filed by Ms. Fox, that it was aware that there was an ex-parte petition which was denied, and that the underlying petition was set for November 23, 2009. Mr. McClain stated that they wanted to continue the matter to amend the petition. Discussions were held regarding Mr. McClain's request to amend the petition. Ms. Fox stated there was no objection to the filing of an amended petition. The Court addressed the ex-parte and stated that per Judge Dearman that no gifts were to be made. The Court continued this matter to November 23, 2009. Ms. Fox stated that because of their concerns that Ms. McClain was requesting an accounting as set forth on the record. The Court stated that it would not compel the accounting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Temporary Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Murphy for and with Robert McClain. Deborah Fox for and with Ann McClain (Petitioner). Other Family members were also present in Court.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court stated that there was no urgency, advised Mr. McClain not to make any more gifts from the trust and denied the Ex Parte Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee.

Judge: John Dearman. Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee Annie Louise Henry, For Confirmation Of Trust Amendments, And For Confirmation Of Successor Truste
